ChatVSL: The Snap Suggestion – Pattern Interrupt and Lead
First ChatGPT Request: Pattern Interrupt Prompt
DATA:
[Niche]=
[Avatar]=
[Primary Goal]=
[Primary Complaint]=
[Promises]=
[Benefits]=
> Pretend you are a professional direct response copywriter. Create a video sales letter pattern interrupt using DATA as a reference. Do not use exclamation marks. Create it as if it were a scene from a movie, with a twist ending and a massive cliff-hanger. Create the interrupt without using characters or requiring filming.
